# Eglaf Technology

> Custom software development company in Ahmedabad, India. We build web apps, mobile apps, AI solutions, and CRM systems.

## About

Eglaf Technology is a leading software development company with 10+ years of experience, delivering 500+ projects worldwide. We specialize in custom software, mobile apps, AI/ML solutions, CRM development, and SEO services.

## Services

- [Web Development](/services/web-development): React, Next.js, Vue.js, Angular web applications
- [Mobile App Development](/services/mobile-development): iOS, Android, Flutter, React Native apps
- [AI Solutions](/services/ai-solutions): Machine learning, NLP, computer vision, chatbots
- [CRM Development](/services/crm-development): Salesforce, HubSpot, custom CRM systems
- [Custom Software](/services/custom-software): Enterprise applications, SaaS platforms
- [SEO Services](/services/seo-services): Search optimization, content strategy

## Contact

- Website: https://eglaftechnology.com
- Email: info@eglaftech.com
- Phone: +91-9898598257
- Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India
